mnemonics.title: WAL Order
mnemonics.content: **L**og **B**efore **D**atabase - Always write to the Log Before updating the Database.

mnemonics.title: 2PC Recovery State
mnemonics.content: **R**eady Log -> **R**ecovery **L**ock - If you have a Ready log record, you are locked during Recovery until you know the outcome.

mnemonics.title: Recovery Phases
mnemonics.content: **U**ndo the **U**ncommitted, **R**edo the **R**esolved (Committed) - Undo phases handles uncommitted transactions, Redo handles committed ones.
